title: Ad-Blocking Resilience
description: Detects when individuals or groups actively block advertising across media and devices, preserving autonomy and protecting memory vaults from identity-shaping propaganda.
indicators: Ads systematically filtered at system/device level
Deliberate choice to opt-out of advertising channels
Information ecology curated for trust, not profit

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
